form.formComment: Gelding by Impending on debut. Trial form indicates he's up to a solid debut. Won a Te Rapa trial over 1100m on September 23. Can make an immediate impact.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Impending on debut. Trial form indicates he's up to a solid debut. Won a Te Rapa trial over 1100m on September 23. Can make an immediate impact.

form.formComment: Most recently raced on the pace when 3rd of 8 at Hawera on March 25 over 1400m, 3 len behind What Next carrying 57.5kg at $5.80. The run before that didn't do much in the run home; 6th of 12 at Tauherenikau on March 5 over 1600m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Shoebill carrying 57.5kg at $2.60. Worth including.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 2nd of 8 at Te Aroha on March 28 over 1150m, on heavy track; 1.5 len behind Wine Rocs with 58kg at $21.10. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Kembla Grange Cge Mdn-Sw on August 30 over 1200m, slow going 3 len behind Ruination carrying 56.5kg at $51. One of the main contenders.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Ellerslie in the LR Gingernuts January 11 over 2100m, 5.5 len behind Ammirati carrying 57kg at $40.20. On debut third of 12 at Tauranga October 1 over 1400m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Reckoning with 56kg at $11.50. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Everything points to a bright return.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Almanzor - Seductive D'oro). Mark Walker & Sam Bergerson has him primed for this with four recent trials leading in today's debut. Ran 3rd in an Avondale trial over 1000m on March 24. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding making debut by Super Easy out of Stole. Was second in a Te Awamutu barrier trial over 1150m October 9. Well worth keeping safe first time out.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Most recently second last of 8 at Hawera on March 25 over 1200m, 13 len behind Marie Antoinette with 56.5kg at $15.50. The start before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 13 at Te Aroha on March 6 over 1600m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Ballbeena with 55.5kg at $50.50. Win doesn?t look likely.

form.formComment: First starter by Puccini out of Court Mistress. Has a total of two trials prior to her debut today. Unlikely to find enough improvement to trouble these.
